title: selaginella cataphracta
intro: Selaginella cataphracta, also known as the spiny club moss, is a type of small, creeping plant belonging to the genus Selaginella. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Selaginella cataphracta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
